title: Rebind v0.5.39 candidate evidence after source parity correction
rawUserRequest: 好，请继续。重新生成 v0.5.39 候选证据，走完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程；不要绕过门禁或重复旧 PR。
outOfScope: Creating or editing a GitHub Release
Changing release workflow, release gates, archive policy, or adopter behavior

sources.reason: Defines the bounded v0.5.39 candidate metadata and premerge evidence lifecycle.
Candidate release identity must remain v0.5.39.
Canonical candidate state and projection digests must be consistent.
Premerge finalizer regenerates source-bound freeze evidence.
Premerge finalizer regenerates candidate artifact identities.
Corrected finalizer now binds premerge archive evidence to controlled source identity.
Release preflight is the final candidate gate.
Merged process correction evidence is the predecessor boundary.

riskAssessment.reason: Only candidate metadata and generated freeze evidence are rebound; publication remains out of scope.

executionDecision.reason: The stale candidate evidence is a bounded release metadata correction after the source-parity process fix.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.json remains v0.5.39 and release-state/next-release projections remain consistent.
After archive, finalize-release-freeze-premerge regenerates source-bound freeze and digest evidence using the corrected finalizer.
Release state consistency, source-bound preflight, full AI/project quality, and PR ownership checks pass.
No tag, GitHub Release, adopter change, workflow change, or archived evidence rewrite is included.
guidelines: Release metadata changes stay within this Contract scope.
Generated freeze and digest evidence is produced only by supported finalizer commands.
Publication remains delegated to the protected release workflow after this lifecycle closes.

intent.problem: The v0.5.39 candidate still contains freeze and archive digests from before the merged-source parity correction, so current release preflight rejects it.
constraints: Use latest origin/main and one dedicated branch.
Do not publish or manually edit generated evidence.
intent.rationale: Rebinding the candidate after the process correction creates one auditable source-bound release snapshot without repeating the obsolete PR.

declaredIntent.summary: Rebuild the v0.5.39 candidate evidence after the source-parity process correction.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: v0.5.39 metadata and candidate projections remain consistent
scenarioCoverage.reason: Verified by release state consistency after metadata preparation.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: premerge freeze matches the corrected canonical source identity
scenarioCoverage.reason: Verified by controlled-source preflight after finalization.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized continuing the v0.5.39 release after process correction.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
